name: Blackberry Jam Cake
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------CARMEL ICING-----------------------
1. Cream together sugar and butter or margarine in a bowl.
2. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, cinnamon, baking soda, cloves, and nutmeg.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and butter/sour milk to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Beat until well combined after each addition.
5. Gently fold in blackberry jam and chopped walnuts, leaving swirls of jam for decoration (do not overmix).
6. Turn batter into a greased and lightly floured 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350°F oven for 25 minutes or until done. Allow to cool completely.
Caramel Icing:
1. In a small saucepan, melt butter or margarine over low heat.
2. Stir in brown sugar and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture bubbles.
3. Remove from heat and stir in milk.
4. Add powdered sugar and beat until smooth and of spreading consistency.
